sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60205" key="krou/sths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κρούσ-της</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> Lat. <sense id="n60205.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">petulcus</tr_>, Dosith.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0019.tlg010.perseus-grc1:p.397" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.397</biblScope> </bibl> K.</sense> </entryFree>
